title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.1280 - Facility compliance list to be maintained, contents
text:
210.1280.  Facility compliance list to be maintained, contents. — The department shall maintain a list of all residential care facilities in compliance with sections 210.1250 to 210.1286, and the list shall be provided upon request.  The list shall also include information regarding how a person may obtain information about the nature and disposition of any substantiated child abuse or neglect reports at or related to the residential care facility, as provided in section 210.150.
(L. 2021 H.B. 557 & 560) 
Effective 7-14-21
